revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:えびす祭り]]
'''Ebisu Festival''' (えびす祭り) refers to various {{ill|festivals|ja|祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/festivals|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭|1=Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q132241}} held across {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. * {{ill|Ebisu Festival (Owase)|ja|えびす祭り (尾鷲市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Festival (Owase)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Held in {{ill|Owase|en|Owase|qid=Q847554|lt=Owase City|1=Owase}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Yōka Ebisu|ja|八日戎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōka Ebisu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Held in {{ill|Nabari, Mie|en|Nabari, Mie|qid=Q166183|lt=Nabari City|1=Nabari, Mie}}, Mie Prefecture. * {{ill|Ebisu Festival (Kurobe)|ja|えびす祭り (黒部市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Festival (Kurobe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Held in {{ill|Kurobe, Toyama|en|Kurobe, Toyama|qid=Q753864|lt=Kurobe City|1=Kurobe, Toyama}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|qid=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture|1=Toyama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Kitano Hiruko Shrine Hikone Tōka Ebisu Festival|ja|北野蛭子神社彦根十日えびす祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Hiruko Shrine Hikone Tōka Ebisu Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Held in {{ill|Hikone, Shiga|en|Hikone, Shiga|qid=Q386635|lt=Hikone City|1=Hikone, Shiga}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Toyonaka Ebisu Festival|ja|豊中えびす祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyonaka Ebisu Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Held in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|Toyonaka|qid=Q467479|lt=Toyonaka City|1=Toyonaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Ebisu Grand Festival|ja|胡子大祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Grand Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 胡子講|1=Ebisukō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11611763}} - Held in {{ill|Hiroshima|en|Hiroshima|qid=Q34664|lt=Hiroshima City|1=Hiroshima}}, {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|qid=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}; also known as "Ebisu-kō." * {{ill|Ebisu Festival (Tokushima)|ja|えびす祭り (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Festival (Tokushima)|1=Ebisu Festival (Tokushima)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11261035}} - Held in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|en|Tokushima (city)|qid=Q207309|lt=Tokushima City|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Wakamatsu Ebisu Festival|ja|若松えびす祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamatsu Ebisu Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Held in {{ill|Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyūshū|en|Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyūshū|qid=Q858184|lt=Wakamatsu Ward|1=Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyūshū}}, {{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|qid=Q188806|lt=Kitakyushu City|1=Kitakyushu}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Kamitori Namiki-zaka Ebisu Festival|ja|上通並木坂えびす祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamitori Namiki-zaka Ebisu Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Held in {{ill|Kumamoto|en|Kumamoto|qid=Q199889|lt=Kumamoto City|1=Kumamoto}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}. * Ebisu Festival - Held in {{ill|Taragi, Kumamoto|en|Taragi, Kumamoto|qid=Q1184655|lt=Taragi Town|1=Taragi, Kumamoto}}, {{ill|Kuma District, Kumamoto|en|Kuma District, Kumamoto|qid=Q1132476|lt=Kuma District|1=Kuma District, Kumamoto}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Ebisu-kō|ja|えびす講|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu-kō|1=Ebisu-kō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11261037}} (Tōka Ebisu) * {{ill|Ebisu (mythology)|en|Ebisu (mythology)|qid=Q1129330|lt=Ebisu|1=Ebisu (mythology)}} {{Shinto Side|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|えびす祭り|version=93069747|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:えびす祭り]]
